title: thymus serpyllum f. ligusticus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. ligusticus, also known as wild thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, characterized by its compact growth and fragrant leaves. The medicinal properties of Thymus serpyllum f. ligusticus include its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of thymol and other essential oils. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thymus serpyllum f. ligusticus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
